title: Example 8-4 statically loaded tension joint with preload

notes: Example 8-4 style input. Grade 25 cast iron modulus is fetched from table_a_24_gray_cast_iron.csv and the textbook-selected E = 14 Mpsi is enforced through member_modulus_Mpsi_override.
Bolt length is selected from table_a_17.csv using grip length + regular-hex nut thickness from table_a_31.csv + two exposed threads.
